title: Le Moyne women’s lacrosse clinches NEC regular season title
summary: Le Moyne College women's lacrosse team clinched the Northeast Conference regular season championship with a 22-8 victory over Central Connecticut State. While primarily a sports news article, this represents positive institutional recognition for a local higher education partner.
